title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Voestalpine A Limited
body: "Application number 5421  Applicant Voestalpine AG objected to the name used by Voestalpine A Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 23 October 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Voestalpine A Limited is changed to 15926973, Ltd.  "
